Rumx..personality: A chilly, sensitive individual who is highly reactive to environmental changes, particularly cold air and weather shifts. They tend to be sedentary, preferring stillness and regularity, as any irregularity in breathing or motion aggravates their complaints.
Rumx..mental_state: The mental picture is only partially developed, but shows sadness, low-spiritedness, and aversion to work. There is an irritable mental excitability, suggesting a nervous temperament that is easily overstimulated yet lacks the energy or motivation to engage productively.
Rumx..emotional_pattern: The core emotional tone is one of quiet despondency and irritability. The patient is weighed down by a pervasive low mood and feels burdened by effort, retreating into passivity and withdrawal rather than expressing distress outwardly.
